feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Penumbra
entry.summary:
Author: Buukkin

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,958Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 12

Summary: Ultraman made it out of the black hole with only his last orders in mind: Kill Superman.He fails. He gets to know Clark. He gets to know himself. And when Clark really needs to go back to his life, he calls in a trusted friend to help the newly liberated clone find his footing in this world.Bruce Wayne just wants to keep a dangerous and unstable metahuman under control at first, but his guest proves to be surprisingly charming.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: They think Im crazy because of you
entry.summary:
Author: Mangojuiceeyy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 796Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: When Batman rises, becoming the Dark Knight who vows to bear Gotham's sins upon his shoulders, Lady Gotham awakens to him. She recognizes not merely a man in a cape, but a knight—her knight—one willing to bleed for a city that has never learned how to love gently. She offers him a precious gift, a companion, a friend, a guardian angel that guides the Caped Cruisader into the dark of the night, but also his daily life OR Batman has an 'invisble' friend that guides him in his decisions, a gift from by lady Gotham. The entity chooses who can see them and decided to stay hidden to (almost) everyone except the Dark Knight so now, everybody thinks Batman is crazy. With how often he talks to himself, it was to be expected.How do Batman's relationships evolve in this universe, where the Voice of Wisdom resides in his head?(he acts like a child at the beggining cuz I HAVE FREE WILL)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Does it have to be the guy sent to rule Earth!? (Said lovingly)
entry.summary:
Author: DirtyBreadWhore

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,415Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Bruce realizes he can’t control his heartbeat when he thinks about Clark. Which is a problem, he's Batman. This obviously leads to Bruce trying to fix it by going straight to the source of the problem. Bigger problems now, however, cause what do you mean he's in love with the wonderful and kind country boy who’s been obviously in love with him for years!? Bruce decides he needs to do something about this. What will he do? Handle it like a responsible adult, probably. Clark is just happy Bruce is standing near him more often and talking to him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: synner (xsynnerx)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,059Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 80

Summary: “Yes, my… my soul hurt. I needed to see you. I… I'll shut up. I know you don't want to hear it.” Bruce hesitated before stepping closer. This just kept getting stranger. “I want to hear it now,” he urged. “I bare my soul to you,” Kal said finally, continuing to whisper. “I share my soul with you.” Or: Bruce accidentally bonds himself to a Kryptonian

entry.title: Part of That World
entry.summary:
Author: BobaTheBlackHole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,654Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 51

Summary: “She was my world, Bruce… and you took her away from me.” Bruce loved Clark before he knew what to call it. He stayed close enough to protect him.Far enough to understand he would never be chosen. And when Bruce finally confessed, Clark’s answer was disgust. But love does not disappear just because it is unwanted. Sometimes, it survives the wound.Sometimes, it survives the ruins.Sometimes, it survives time itself. Even for the person who never wanted it back.

entry.title: Don't Look Back
entry.summary:
Author: lovelytime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,808Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 84

Summary: Clark had died, and the world kept spinning. He wasn't quite sure where he fit now that he was back, but he knew better than to look back. Unfortunately, old habits die hard.

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,157Chapters: 22/26Kudos: 507

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.title: Hello, Chaos Trio!
entry.summary:
Author: FERAL_Vesper31

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 619Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Ayo! This is basically a collection of Clark → Bruce ← Joker comedic scenarios that will randomly pop into my head. There's a reason the "I Blame Tumblr" tag is here. I don't want to take up too much of the summary explaining things, but if the tags, the whole premise, and the idea of these three causing absolute chaos interests you, then maybe it just do, yea know? Enjoy the shenanigans! —Author

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,277Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 107

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.summary:

entry.summary:
Author: chibithedragonkitty

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,136Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 235

entry.title: chasing the idea of you
entry.summary:
Author: 4LiberTEA

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,302Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Forced together for business reasons, Bruce and Clark need to learn how to work together both in and out the suit, all the while dealing with their respective feelings for the other person's secret identity. As they chase love at one end, it comes running from the opposite direction. Will their feelings for one another ever intersect? Or will they keep running in endless squares circles?

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,768Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 17

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway.​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him... ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,168Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 272

entry.title: Wings and Fangs: A Ladyhawke AU
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,248Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Bruce Wayne becomes a hawk at sunrise. Kal-El becomes a wolf at sunset. Ninety seconds of overlap twice a day. Three years of this. They can see each other. Can't touch. Can't speak. Just run toward each other and fail, over and over, while their bodies break and the curse grinds them down to nothing. Ra's al Ghul built it to torture them. Punishment for refusing to serve. For loving each other. For being happy. Tim Drake finds them six months after everyone else gave up looking. He's wounded, obsessed, and the entire hero community thinks he's lost it. He doesn't care. With a guilt-ridden mage, a solar eclipse, and sheer bloody-minded determination, Tim is going to break an unbreakable curse. Even if it kills him. A Ladyhawke AU. Body horror. Transformation curses. Two legends reduced to beasts. And one Robin who refuses to let them suffer alone.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 119,669Chapters: 23/30Kudos: 724

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.
